allowed_batch_unit_now: one direct raw JSON report object plus linked vulnerability ID check
max_bounded_batch_now: start with 1 canonical report row and at most 1 linked vulnerability object per cycle
fields_safe_to_carry_now: AVID report/vulnerability IDs, reported_date, problemtype label, metric name, linked references, source URL, license note
provenance_minimum_now: public raw URL, retrieval timestamp, MIT license note, source family, object type, exact AVID ID
blocked_actions_now: Do not reframe AVID as a general incident census or bulk-mirror the repo into LIMEN.
first_target_use_now: Replicated exact security-row seed import with stable external IDs preserved across the current Langflow-plus-ToolHive pair.
threshold_to_expand_now: Land one third canonical direct AVID join outside the current Langflow-plus-ToolHive pair.

allowed_batch_unit_now: one distributed YAML case-study or technique relation slice with version/deprecation state attached
max_bounded_batch_now: start with 1 case-study or technique-to-mitigation slice per cycle
fields_safe_to_carry_now: ATLAS case-study/technique/mitigation IDs, names, relation type, version, deprecation banner, source URL
provenance_minimum_now: public raw URL, retrieval timestamp, Apache-2.0 license note, version `5.6.0`, deprecation-status note
blocked_actions_now: Do not treat technique context as exact same-case identity or mirror the full graph into LIMEN without need.
first_target_use_now: Security graph overlay for techniques, mitigations, and cautious case-study context.
threshold_to_expand_now: Land one defensible direct ATLAS case-study ID for an already-seeded LIMEN row.

allowed_batch_unit_now: one public cite/page-data incident record with exact field-family capture
max_bounded_batch_now: 1 incident page-data JSON object per cycle until reuse/export ceiling improves
fields_safe_to_carry_now: incident_id, title, date, description summary, report numbers, public cite URL, taxonomy field-family notes
provenance_minimum_now: public cite URL, direct page-data URL, retrieval timestamp, source family, snapshot-lag caution, no-license-upgrade note
blocked_actions_now: Do not mirror snapshots in bulk or infer stable open-export equivalence from one reachable page-data route.
first_target_use_now: Bounded same-event comparator pilot and methods-row example.
threshold_to_expand_now: Land one additional carefully bounded same-event overlap or stronger stable export proof.

allowed_batch_unit_now: one official detail JSON record plus optional small vocabulary-facet sample
max_bounded_batch_now: 1 incident detail JSON object plus at most 1 tiny facet sample per cycle
fields_safe_to_carry_now: id, title, article date, source article URL, jurisdiction/language/concept facet labels, public detail URL
provenance_minimum_now: public detail URL, exact API URL, retrieval timestamp, official-source note, rights-caution note
blocked_actions_now: Do not treat public API reachability as permission for broad export, mirroring, or unrestricted machine-ingest.
first_target_use_now: Official-comparator pilot with exact record metadata and vocabulary bridge.
threshold_to_expand_now: Land one additional exact same-event overlap or stronger explicit reuse statement.

allowed_batch_unit_now: one imported workbook tab or one bounded workbook statistics/resource slice with sheet name recorded
max_bounded_batch_now: 1 workbook tab or 1 small workbook statistics/resource slice per cycle; current local slices `Domain Taxonomy of AI Risks v1`, `Causal Taxonomy of AI Risks v1`, and `Domain Taxonomy statistics` are materialized and support twelve bounded bridge rows plus one reviewer-safe denominator sidecar, but do not mirror the rest of the workbook by default
fields_safe_to_carry_now: anchor IDs, domain/subdomain codes and labels, descriptions, workbook tab name, workbook updated note, export URL, source URL, retrieval timestamp, CC BY note
provenance_minimum_now: public risks URL, export URL, retrieval timestamp, CC BY 4.0 note, workbook/tab name, source family, mirror-specific caution
blocked_actions_now: Do not claim incident-style record truth, do not mirror the whole workbook into LIMEN, and do not generalize Google-export reachability to every named distribution endpoint.
first_target_use_now: Structured taxonomy appendix and drift-audit surface for methods/related-work/dashboard heatmap support.
threshold_to_expand_now: Land one thirteenth shared local taxonomy bridge row or one fourth bounded workbook/resource slice with explicit provenance.

max_bounded_batch_now: 1 citation row or 1 manual coding decision per cycle; no dataset-style import batch
fields_safe_to_carry_now: article title, URL, publication context if visible, manual harm-category interpretation note
provenance_minimum_now: public article URL, retrieval timestamp, all-rights-reserved/manual-only note, source family
blocked_actions_now: Do not machine-ingest or mirror article text absent a verified permissive reuse signal.
threshold_to_expand_now: Land a stronger explicit reuse signal or keep the source in manual overlay mode.
